## Notas do Apresentador

_Notas Slide 1: What’s up everyone! I’m Nick Shackelford, For the past 6 years I have been building my skills, understanding and ability to sell things online beginning with big brands and teams and now I’ve found my sweet spot in partnering with brands that have the ability to exceed $50M a year. I’ve been fortunate enough to be involved to some capacity alongside 160+ brands, there are clear trends and patterns that brands that succeed or give themselves the best opportunity to succeed do on a repeatable basis. That is leverage paid media to raise brand affinity._

_Notas Slide 2: What we are covering today Creative, How We Analyze and Look At Creative Live Test, Which Did Better? (Prospecting/Re-engagement/Remarketing) (Maybe) How We Currently Launch and Test Creatives / Our way of creative iteration_

_Notas Slide 3: So with everything everyone is hearing now about the rising costs of Facebook, the inconsistency of the platform as well as the need to diversify immediately has never filled my feed more than it has these last 6 months. Which is why I feel this is the perfect time to re-evaluate the involvement and utilization of influencers with your paid media strategy is. This is applicable across (Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, Tik Tok and Pinterest) but for the audience that I believe will get the most out of this is the brands and teams spending majority of paid dollars on Facebook. Awesome! So let me layout where this is headed_

_Notas Slide 4: What we are covering today My argument and position on why the Influencer world as a whole is here to stay and why Facebook needs that world to continue to stay human. The new way from today forwards you watching will view marketing dollars spent on Influencers and Creators_

_Notas Slide 6: Influencer Marketing Isn’t leaving. In fact it is probably the most consistent form of advertising right along side TV and magazines In truth, influencers have been running the world for years. We just haven’t called them that. Instead, we called them “movie stars” - But this is what people saw - the mediums they saw their stars. Well now because of social media, we see up and close and personal - what they wear, what they sing in the car, what time they get up, when they go to the gym, their brunch on Sunday, etc etc etc And because we have this access to them - the gap that used to exist between me and Michael Jordan is now way smaller between me and Steph Curry -he’s more like the cool friend - NOT THE MAJOR CELEB._

_Notas Slide 7: Influencer Marketing could be worth upwards of 10 billion by 2022. Kynship will have most of that. Why the term Influencer? It’s not tied to any one platform - it’s generic in a really good way. It’s not Instagram Personality or Talent. In addition to IM trend going up so is everything else_

_Notas Slide 8: Influencer Marketing could be worth upwards of 10 billion by 2022. With the youth aspiring, and availability to anyone who wishes to create, the growth is undenaible_

_Notas Slide 9: It’s not just the kids or teens asipiring but the brands and advertisers learning and executing._

_Notas Slide 11: Because Money is still very green! It works. It continues to motivate and provide revenue for well positioned and congruent products to personalities._

_Notas Slide 14: YOY to be around 12-15%. Comparatively, retail is growing 2% Now even if you are in the back of the room.. You can still see where this is heading. Up and to the right. Progress! The overall behavior and adoption of social platforms is still having a positive correlation on the growth of ecommerce businesses._

_Notas Slide 15: ecommerce revenue industry wide continues to see strong growth year over year has a lot to do with the increase of advertisers entering the platforms. We will continue to see delivery as the focal point of these platforms With new platforms continously rising of user adoption, with tik tok and snap As well as better self serve interfaces for advertisers The spend on advertising is not looking to slow down_

_Notas Slide 18: SO i’m a young millennial, I think. 90’s child and I am a hyper user of platforms and direct response consumers. Now I don’t believe people ar spending 6+ hours a day like myself but I do think that they are increasingly spending more and more time on the platforms they love. Whether that be instagram, snap or tik tok on the rise. So knowing this, reassures my investment in the platforms that still demand the most attention which means investing in those that demand the attention on the platforms that demand attention._

_Notas Slide 26: Your going to need to get content made anyways, why not have the influencer contribute to that endeavor, even_

_Notas Slide 27: Clearly identified winning product, partner with influencer to do unique or one off edition. Find the influencer that embodies the consumer that is currently buying your product, double down on that user base growth_

_Notas Slide 28: Various winning angles for multiple products. The diversification of why a consumer could potentially like your brand or product can now be constantly tweaked and optimized based upon the influencers you partner with. Testing into new audiences that seem congruent but more defined through the use of an influencer launch/collab_

_Notas Slide 29: Regardless of where a brand is right now, the game is still content iteration and optimization. There is never going to be enough tests or opportunities to improve on what is always working. So the new approach that can really be utilized by brands/business at most stages in their growth. I’ll do my best to explain why this is applicable for brands at different points in their journey before laying out the campaign we run consistently and utilize somewhere in your Facebook Funnel._

_Notas Slide 36: So in support of all sides of the table. I as an agency see the value that influencers are providing Agencies, Brands, and Marketers - Content, Distribution and Validity Research and state of the unions created by Mediakix and influencer marketing hub found that of the marketers/brands/agencies they’ve polled. More and more of their adspend is being allocated towards influencer support/campaigns and in the same breathe, they are more often looking for the increase of brand awareness and to reach new audiences - all before generating sales - But what if we were able to have our cake and eat it too… The increase in awareness, the new audiences, and the generation of sales? Well we are currently, and brands already_

_Notas Slide 37: So the new approach that can really be utilized by brands/business at most stages in their growth. I’ll do my best to explain why this is applicable for brands at different points in their journey before laying out the campaign we run consitently and utilize somewhere in your Facebook Funnel._

I’ll do my best to explain why this is applicable for brands at different points in their journey before laying out the campaign we run consitently and utilize somewhere in your Facebook Funnel._

_Notas Slide 52: We follow a process that we have developed of qualifying “high performing” influencers that are great “salespeople” more than they are just access to additional distribution Step 1: A Large Set (10+) Micro Influencers That Present Brand Qualities And Have A Highly Engaged Following Step 2: Each Influencer With Specific Product, Talking Points and A Unique Trackable Link Step3: Each Influencer Posts An IG Story Testimonial With A Swipe Up CTA_

_Notas Slide 53: Once all of the influencers have posted we analyze the outcome both quantitatively by looking at swipe up rate and purchases and qualitatively to determine who created the most on brand content. Refersion is a great app we use as well as simply appending your own UTM strand you are seeing here. As you can also see. We are focusing this initial testing period through IG/FB Stories Specifically - Now I understand that there may be a collection of you asking, where’s the content for the feed, this isn’t a true test… To those of you that are in this camp. You’re not wrong and we haven’t forgotten about you and we believe that repurposing content as well as leveraging their audiences would be a strong step 2 after we are able to measure the initial swipe up ratios and revenue driving ability of an influencers IG/FB Story. Plus - the nature of content for this platform and placement checks the box of believability and trust. The potential hurdle we are looking to eliminate is the lack of ability to click out on a newsfeed post (unless only running collection creative only) which would then potentially introduce 3-6 micro hurdles before a purchase could even be attempted. Stop Watch Click to Brand/Influencer Click Link on Brand or Influencer Bio Land on Collection/Product Page Begin Checkout Sequence. What we are focused upon doing is eliminating the friction of content seen to product purchased. Once we have identified our winning guys and gals. We move into our scaling stage._

_Notas Slide 56: Once we have identified the top performers we will reach back out to them to for a partnership that delivers three things: 1. Page access to run paid campaigns through their account 2. Access to their audiences 3. Two additional pieces of content a (longer form testimonial for prospecting and an asset for re-marketing)_

_Notas Slide 57: So the new approach that can really be utilized by brands/business at most stages in their growth. I’ll do my best to explain why this is applicable for brands at different points in their journey before laying out the campaign we run consitently and utilize somewhere in your Facebook Funnel._

_Notas Slide 58: Part of the value of access influencer pages is that you can pull in their audiences to target with their promoted ads as well as your own. During this campaign we will run paid programs to their core audiences as well as the top performing audiences from your account._

_Notas Slide 60: This isn’t about the influencers. It’s about the specific talking points and delivery of content at each step of the funnel. Speak to the funnel of Influencer Page + Content -> Influencer Mash Up + Branded elements -> DPA selected of specific products -> Unique Landing Page to close off the campaign or a hidden collection page that speaks to “XXXXXX Favorites”_
